# Mobile UI Generator Skill

Mobile UI Generator Skill is an AI-agent skill for generating service-aware mobile UX/UI briefs, JSON specs, font profiles, copy systems, and implementation prompts.

Website: https://jinyoung89.github.io/mobile-ui-generator-skill/
Korean: https://jinyoung89.github.io/mobile-ui-generator-skill/ko/
Repository: https://github.com/jinyoung89/mobile-ui-generator-skill
Skill: skills/mobile-ui-generator/SKILL.md

Primary topics: mobile UI generation, UX/UI briefs, Korean mobile UI, font profiles, JSON UI specs, AI agent skills.
